---
title: "Release History"
---

[← Gallery](../gallery.html)

::: {.timeline .tl-label-badge}
::: {.event data-label="v1.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #6366f1;"}
**Initial Release**
Core timeline layouts ship: horizontal, vertical, and vertical-alt.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v1.5" style="--tl-color-accent: #0891b2;"}
**Snake Layout**
New serpentine path layout added for multi-row roadmaps.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v2.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #16a34a;"}
**Modifier Classes**
`.tl-card`, `.tl-label-banner`, `.tl-label-badge`, and dot shape classes introduced.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v2.5" style="--tl-color-accent: #d97706;"}
**Fragment Pan Modes**
Slide and conveyor panning for RevealJS presentations.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v3.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #dc2626;"}
**Stable API**
Dark mode defaults, grouped events, and empty event support. Extension declared stable.
:::
:::

Horizontal layout with `.tl-label-badge` and per-event `--tl-color-accent`. The badge and dot both inherit the accent color automatically.

````markdown
::: {.timeline .tl-label-badge}
::: {.event data-label="v1.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #6366f1;"}
**Initial Release**
Core timeline layouts ship: horizontal, vertical, and vertical-alt.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v1.5" style="--tl-color-accent: #0891b2;"}
**Snake Layout**
New serpentine path layout added for multi-row roadmaps.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v2.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #16a34a;"}
**Modifier Classes**
`.tl-card`, `.tl-label-banner`, `.tl-label-badge`, and dot shape classes introduced.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v2.5" style="--tl-color-accent: #d97706;"}
**Fragment Pan Modes**
Slide and conveyor panning for RevealJS presentations.
:::
::: {.event data-label="v3.0" style="--tl-color-accent: #dc2626;"}
**Stable API**
Dark mode defaults, grouped events, and empty event support. Extension declared stable.
:::
:::
````
